title: meliosma lepidota subsp. dumicola
intro: Meliosma lepidota subsp. dumicola, also known as the Philippine meliosma, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Meliosmaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Meliosma lepidota subsp. dumicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and improve respiratory health, offering potential health benefits such as relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or added to topical creams and ointments for localized treatment.
